archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for B2B Tech
design_philosophy: Blend modern tech aesthetics (depth, subtle tech motifs, smooth transitions) with corporate professionalism (trust, authority, clean typography). Emphasize scale (biggest in Marathwada), authority (HP regional distributor), and trust.

layout_strategy.container: h-screen w-full overflow-y-auto snap-y snap-mandatory scroll-smooth hide-scrollbar
layout_strategy.section: min-h-screen w-full snap-start snap-always relative flex items-center justify-center pt-16 md:pt-0 overflow-hidden
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for internal card paddings. Elements should breathe.
layout_strategy.grid: Bento grid for Services and Partnerships sections. Asymmetrical 12-column layouts for desktop.

components.navigation: Fixed glassmorphism header (z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80). Include Logo (text), Links to sections, and 'Contact Us' button.
components.slides_indicator: Fixed right-side dot navigation indicating the current slide (1 to 6).
components.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary: bg-[#0055FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0044CC] rounded-none. Secondary: outline border-border text-text_main.
components.forms: Shadcn Input/Textarea. High contrast focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0055FF] focus:border-transparent).
components.whatsapp_cta: Fixed bottom-right floating button (z-50) with WhatsApp icon, pulsing animation, bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-lg.

pages_structure.name: Home/Hero
pages_structure.layout: Dark theme section. Background image with bg-black/60 overlay. Large H1, Tagline, Primary CTA (Scroll to Contact) and Secondary CTA (View Services).

pages_structure.name: About & Vision
pages_structure.layout: Light theme. Split layout (1/2 text, 1/2 image). Large typography 'Established in 2005'. Emphasize 'Marathwada's Biggest Authorized Distributor'.

pages_structure.name: Partnerships & Brands
pages_structure.layout: Light/Gray theme. Bento grid or Marquee of logos. Prominent 'HP Regional Distributor' badge. Followed by Lenovo, Dell, Intel, etc.
pages_structure.icons_strategy: Use react-icons/si for (SiHp, SiLenovo, SiDell, SiIntel, SiMicrosoft, SiAmd, SiEpson). For others, use clean typography.

pages_structure.name: Services
pages_structure.layout: Dark theme to show tech contrast. 4-column or bento grid showing: Laptop/Desktop Sales, IT Hardware, CCTV Installation, Repair & Maintenance.

pages_structure.name: Major Clients & Training
pages_structure.layout: Light theme. Split view. Left: Jetking Partnership (3500+ placements). Right: Client list (Govt, Police, Banks). Use server room background softly.

pages_structure.name: Contact
pages_structure.layout: Light theme. Centered contact form (Name, Email, Phone, Message) + Company address/Phone details. Clean card layout with subtle shadow.

hero_tech_bg.description: Abstract tech background for the hero section

security_cctv.description: Modern CCTV camera in corporate setting

office_building.description: Modern office building exterior for About section

server_room.description: Server room datacenter for Clients/Training section

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Use smooth scrolling for in-page navigation. Use Framer Motion for entrance animations (fade up, stagger children) on slide entry. Do not over-animate.
accessibility_and_motion.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit', data-testid='whatsapp-cta', data-testid='nav-about').
accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Ensure white text over dark backgrounds has sufficient contrast (opacity min 90%). For hero overlay, use bg-black/60 minimum.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 6-section scroll-snap page where each section takes 100vh. Ensure mobile responsiveness. Implement CSS scroll-snap properly.
Install and use 'react-icons' (import from 'react-icons/si' and 'react-icons/fa') for brand logos and UI icons.
Install and use 'framer-motion' for slide entrance animations.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Use Outfit (or similar modern geometric sans) via Google Fonts.
Implement a fixed side navigation (dots) that updates active state based on scroll position.
Ensure the WhatsApp CTA is floating globally on the bottom right.
Implement the Contact form using Shadcn UI forms. Since no backend is provided, simulate submission with a toast notification.
Ensure NO placeholder image URLs are used. Only use the media_assets provided.
CRITICAL: Create React components as .jsx or .js files, NOT .tsx (since the environment uses javascript).
